title: Vellakkovil Heat Wave
lead: Vellakkovil is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.77. Temperatures are extremely high, causing severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Vellakkovil has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The heat wave is characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.2 GG, and moderate humidity at 63%. 
 The wind speed is 17.9 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
